---
title: "Quote Bank"
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| echo: false

import sys
from pathlib import Path

def _find_root(start):
    for p in [start] + list(start.parents):
        if (p / "_quarto.yml").exists():
            return p
    return start

_root = _find_root(Path.cwd())
sys.path.insert(0, str(_root / "shared"))

from viz_helpers import load_study_data

participants_df, quotes_df = load_study_data(_root / "studies" / "pretour-research-2026")
```

TODO: render searchable table từ `quotes_df` — ví dụ dùng `quotes_df.to_html()` hoặc thư viện `itables`.

```{python}
#| output: asis

print(f"Total quotes: {len(quotes_df)}")
```
